members.name: disabled
members.description: Specify whether the Button should be disabled, or not.

members.name: kind
members.description: Specify the kind of Button you want to create.

members.name: size
members.description: Specify the size of the button, from a list of available sizes.

members.name: href
members.description: Optionally specify an href for your Button to become an <a> element.

members.name: isExpressive
members.description: Specify whether the Button is an expressive size variant.

events.name: click
events.description: Fired when the button is clicked.

slots.description: Default slot for button label text.

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Slot for an icon to display in the button.

cssProperties.name: --cds-interactive
cssProperties.description: The primary interactive color used for the button background.

cssProperties.name: --cds-button-primary-hover
cssProperties.description: The primary button background color on hover.

cssProperties.name: --cds-button-primary-active
cssProperties.description: The primary button background color when active.

declarations.name: CDSModal
declarations.description: Carbon Design System modal dialog component.

members.name: open
members.description: Specify whether the Modal is currently open.

members.name: size
members.description: Specify the size of the Modal.

members.name: preventCloseOnClickOutside
members.description: Prevent the modal from closing when the user clicks outside.

members.name: fullWidth
members.description: Specify whether the Modal should use full-width layout.

events.name: cds-modal-beingclosed
events.description: The custom event fired before the modal is closed.

events.name: cds-modal-closed
events.description: The custom event fired after the modal is closed.

slots.description: Default slot for modal body content.

cssProperties.name: --cds-layer
cssProperties.description: The layer background color used in the modal.

declarations.name: CDSTextInput
declarations.description: Carbon Design System text input component.

members.name: label
members.description: The label text.

members.name: value
members.description: The input value.

members.name: placeholder
members.description: Placeholder text for the input.

members.name: invalid
members.description: Specify whether the control is currently invalid.

members.name: invalidText
members.description: Provide the text that is displayed when the control is in an invalid state.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Specify whether the control is disabled.

members.name: readonly
members.description: Specify whether the control is read-only.

members.name: size
members.description: Specify the size of the input.

events.name: cds-text-input-input
events.description: The custom event fired on user input.

events.name: change
events.description: Fired when the input value changes.

members.name: value
members.description: The value of the selected item.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Specify whether the dropdown should be disabled.

members.name: open
members.description: Specify whether the dropdown is currently open.

members.name: size
members.description: Specify the size of the dropdown.

members.name: helperText
members.description: Helper text that is used alongside the control label.

members.name: label
members.description: The label of the dropdown.

members.name: titleText
members.description: The title text for the dropdown.

events.name: cds-dropdown-selected
events.description: The custom event fired after a dropdown item is selected.

events.name: cds-dropdown-beingselected
events.description: The custom event fired before a dropdown item is selected.

cssProperties.name: --cds-border-strong
cssProperties.description: The border color for the dropdown.
